---
title: "District Wildfire Missed Student-Days"
format:
  html:
    fig-width: 12
    fig-height: 7.2
    fig-dpi: 180
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(scales)
library(sf)

to_number <- function(x) {
  readr::parse_number(as.character(x), na = c("", "NA", "N/A", "NULL", "*"))
}

safe_divide <- function(num, den) {
  if_else(!is.na(den) & den > 0, num / den, NA_real_)
}

clean_cds_code <- function(x) {
  digits <- str_remove_all(coalesce(as.character(x), ""), "[^0-9]")
  if_else(digits == "", NA_character_, str_pad(digits, width = 14, side = "left", pad = "0"))
}

first_non_missing <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x) & x != ""]
  if (length(x) == 0) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }
  x[[1]]
}

short_number <- function(x) {
  case_when(
    is.na(x) ~ NA_character_,
    abs(x) >= 1000000 ~ str_glue("{round(x / 1000000, 1)}M"),
    abs(x) >= 1000 ~ str_glue("{round(x / 1000)}k"),
    TRUE ~ label_comma(accuracy = 1)(x)
  )
}

analysis_years <- c(2018, 2019)

closure_file <- "annual_school_closures_standardized_test_scores_ca_2003_2019.csv"
closure_path_candidates <- c(
  file.path("..", "data", "raw", "school_fire", closure_file),
  file.path("data", "raw", "school_fire", closure_file)
)

closure_path <- closure_path_candidates[file.exists(closure_path_candidates)][1]
if (is.na(closure_path)) {
  stop("Could not find the closure CSV. Check the relative path from this Quarto file.")
}

district_shape_path_candidates <- c(
  file.path("..", "data", "raw", "DistrictAreas2425", "DistrictAreas2425.shp"),
  file.path("data", "raw", "DistrictAreas2425", "DistrictAreas2425.shp")
)

district_shape_path <- district_shape_path_candidates[file.exists(district_shape_path_candidates)][1]
if (is.na(district_shape_path)) {
  stop("Could not find the district shapefile. Expected data/raw/DistrictAreas2425/DistrictAreas2425.shp.")
}
```

```{r load-and-summarize}
closure_data <- readr::read_csv(
  closure_path,
  col_types = readr::cols(.default = readr::col_character()),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  clean_names()

if ("days_wildfires" %in% names(closure_data) && !"days_wildfire" %in% names(closure_data)) {
  closure_data <- closure_data |>
    rename(days_wildfire = days_wildfires)
}

closure_window <- closure_data |>
  mutate(
    year = as.integer(year),
    county = str_squish(str_to_title(county)),
    district_name = str_squish(district_name),
    cds_code = clean_cds_code(cds_code),
    cd_code = str_sub(cds_code, 1, 7),
    across(any_of(c("days_wildfire", "days_total", "total_enrollment")), to_number),
    days_wildfire = replace_na(days_wildfire, 0),
    days_total = replace_na(days_total, 0),
    total_enrollment = replace_na(total_enrollment, 0),
    wildfire_student_days = days_wildfire * total_enrollment
  ) |>
  filter(year %in% analysis_years)

district_window_burden <- closure_window |>
  filter(!is.na(cd_code)) |>
  group_by(cd_code) |>
  summarise(
    county = first_non_missing(county),
    district_name = first_non_missing(district_name),
    school_year_rows = n(),
    schools = n_distinct(cds_code),
    wildfire_affected_schools = n_distinct(cds_code[days_wildfire > 0]),
    total_enrollment_school_years = sum(total_enrollment, na.rm = TRUE),
    wildfire_days = sum(days_wildfire, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_closure_days = sum(days_total, na.rm = TRUE),
    wildfire_student_days = sum(wildfire_student_days, na.rm = TRUE),
    missed_student_days_per_1000_student_years = 1000 *
      safe_divide(wildfire_student_days, total_enrollment_school_years),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

district_shapes <- sf::st_read(district_shape_path, quiet = TRUE) |>
  sf::st_make_valid() |>
  mutate(
    cd_code = str_pad(as.character(CDCode), width = 7, side = "left", pad = "0"),
    district_shape_name = DistrictNa,
    county_shape = CountyName,
    district_type = factor(DistrictTy, levels = c("Elementary", "High", "Unified"))
  ) |>
  select(
    cd_code,
    district_shape_name,
    county_shape,
    district_type,
    geometry
  ) |>
  sf::st_transform(3310)

district_map_data <- district_shapes |>
  left_join(district_window_burden, by = "cd_code") |>
  mutate(
    has_closure_record = !is.na(school_year_rows),
    district_label = coalesce(district_name, district_shape_name),
    wildfire_student_days_map = if_else(
      has_closure_record,
      replace_na(wildfire_student_days, 0),
      NA_real_
    ),
    burden_bin = case_when(
      is.na(wildfire_student_days_map) ~ NA_character_,
      wildfire_student_days_map == 0 ~ "No recorded wildfire missed days",
      wildfire_student_days_map <= 25000 ~ "1-25k",
      wildfire_student_days_map <= 100000 ~ "25k-100k",
      wildfire_student_days_map <= 250000 ~ "100k-250k",
      TRUE ~ "More than 250k"
    ),
    burden_bin = factor(
      burden_bin,
      levels = c(
        "No recorded wildfire missed days",
        "1-25k",
        "25k-100k",
        "100k-250k",
        "More than 250k"
      )
    )
  ) |>
  filter(district_type %in% c("Elementary", "High", "Unified"))

county_outline <- district_shapes |>
  filter(district_type %in% c("Elementary", "High", "Unified")) |>
  group_by(county_shape) |>
  summarise(geometry = sf::st_union(geometry), .groups = "drop")

label_points <- suppressWarnings(
  district_map_data |>
    filter(wildfire_student_days_map > 0) |>
    group_by(district_type) |>
    slice_max(wildfire_student_days_map, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
    ungroup() |>
    mutate(
      label_name = str_remove_all(
        district_label,
        regex("\\s+(Unified|Elementary|High)$", ignore_case = TRUE)
      ),
      label = str_glue(
        "{str_wrap(label_name, width = 14)}\n{short_number(wildfire_student_days_map)} missed days"
      )
    ) |>
    sf::st_point_on_surface()
)
```

```{r district-wildfire-map-editorial}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 7.2
district_burden_palette <- c(
  "No recorded wildfire missed days" = "#DEDAD0",
  "1-25k" = "#F0C989",
  "25k-100k" = "#E28A5B",
  "100k-250k" = "#BD4A36",
  "More than 250k" = "#6F1D14"
)

district_wildfire_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = district_map_data,
    aes(fill = burden_bin),
    color = "#F8F5EF",
    linewidth = 0.025
  ) +
  geom_sf(
    data = county_outline,
    fill = NA,
    color = alpha("#5D5850", 0.45),
    linewidth = 0.12
  ) +
  geom_sf_label(
    data = label_points,
    aes(label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    family = "sans",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 2.65,
    lineheight = 0.92,
    color = "#272521",
    fill = alpha("#F8F5EF", 0.9),
    linewidth = 0,
    label.padding = grid::unit(2.5, "pt"),
    label.r = grid::unit(0, "pt")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(vars(district_type), nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = district_burden_palette,
    na.value = "#F1EEE7",
    na.translate = FALSE,
    drop = FALSE,
    name = "Wildfire missed student-days"
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(
      nrow = 1,
      byrow = TRUE,
      keywidth = grid::unit(20, "pt"),
      keyheight = grid::unit(6, "pt"),
      title.position = "top"
    )
  ) +
  coord_sf(datum = NA, clip = "off") +
  labs(
    title = "Wildfire closures hit Unified School districts far harder than others",
    subtitle = "Wildfire missed student-days by district, 2017-18 and 2018-19. Panels separate district types because elementary, high school and unified district boundaries can overlap.",
    caption = "Source: Annual school closures and standardized test scores in California, 2003-2019; CDE district-area boundaries, 2024-25. District boundaries are reference geography and may not perfectly match 2017-18 or 2018-19 boundaries."
  ) +
  theme_void(base_size = 12, base_family = "sans") +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(
      family = "Georgia",
      face = "bold",
      size = 15,
      color = "#171512",
      margin = margin(b = 8)
    ),
    panel.spacing.x = grid::unit(12, "pt"),
    plot.title = element_text(
      family = "Georgia",
      face = "bold",
      size = 24,
      color = "#111111",
      margin = margin(b = 7)
    ),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size = 10.6,
      color = "#4E4942",
      margin = margin(b = 18)
    ),
    plot.caption = element_text(
      size = 8.2,
      color = "#666057",
      hjust = 0,
      lineheight = 1.15,
      margin = margin(t = 12)
    ),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "left",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold", color = "#403C36"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8.2, color = "#4D4841"),
    legend.margin = margin(t = 6, b = 2),
    legend.box.margin = margin(t = 4, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0),
    plot.margin = margin(24, 18, 18, 18)
  )

district_wildfire_map
```
```{r}
dir.create(file.path("reports", "figures"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
ggsave(
  filename = file.path("reports", "figures", "district_wildfire_map.png"),
  plot = district_wildfire_map,
  width = 14,
  height = 7.2,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)
```
